nasb.text: “Speak to the sons of Israel, and say to them, ‘When any man has a discharge from his body, his discharge is unclean.

esv.text: “Speak to the people of Israel and say to them, When any man has a discharge from his body, his discharge is unclean.

cnv.text: “你們要告訴以色列人，對他們說：如果男子的下體有異常排泄，他的排泄物是不潔淨的，

ccb.text: “你们把以下条例告诉以色列人。 “如果有男人患了漏症，他下体的排泄物是不洁净的。
